title: rubus × refertus
intro: Rubus × refertus, also known as hybrid raspberry, is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus, resulting in a plant with unique characteristics and properties. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus × refertus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
